$ cat ./podcast

The Front End Nerdery Podcast — conversations with web developers, designers, and accessibility advocates. Currently on hiatus. Listen on Spotify or watch on YouTube.

support my work

I build accessible, open-source tools and write about web accessibility. If my work has helped you, consider sponsoring or advertising here.
